mapper.select: SELECT a.name AS app_name, a.number AS app_number, a.icon AS app_icon, b.number AS cloud_number FROM t_sys_app a LEFT JOIN t_sys_cloud b ON b.id = a.cloud_id WHERE a.id = #{appId}

SELECT DISTINCT a.* FROM t_sys_menu a
INNER JOIN t_sys_role_perms b ON b.permission_id = a.permission_id INNER JOIN t_sys_user_role c ON c.role_id = b.role_id
WHERE a.app_id = #{appId} AND a.level IN (2, 3) AND c.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY a.level, a.sort, a.create_time
mapper.update: UPDATE t_sys_menu SET number = #{number}, name = #{name}, level = #{level}, parent_id = #{parentId}, app_id = #{appId}, permission_id = #{permissionId}, path = #{path}, component = #{component}, icon = #{icon}, description = #{description}, sort = #{sort}, enabled = #{enabled}, update_time = #{updateTime}, update_user = #{updateUser} WHERE id = #{id}
